# Local workspace design direction

- Subject: a user-owned Personal Agent Workspace on one machine.
- Audience: one owner returning daily to conversations, files, mail, and automations.
- Page job: reveal what needs attention and provide a fast path back into work.
- Palette: graphite `#15171A`, paper `#F4F1E8`, signal blue `#2557D6`, moss `#4B6548`, warning amber `#C57A16`.
- Type roles: humanist sans for navigation, sturdy serif for current-work titles, mono for machine state.
- Layout: one active-work ribbon crossing a quiet two-column field; status stays peripheral until action is required.
- Signature: a locally rendered activity spine that connects conversation, file, and automation events without decorative numbering.
- Restraint: no generic KPI row, no floating glass cards, no feature-marketing copy.
- Quality floor: keyboard focus, reduced motion, mobile reflow, explicit empty/error recovery.
